Title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
Actors: Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Paavan suneja
Plot: Sai Joshi, a fearless girl who aspires to become a doctor, marries an IPS officer, Virat Chavan, pretending to be a deal. The story revolves around the life of Sai in orthodox joint family of Virat and how Sai and Virat fall in love.
